admission_policy.fresh: >=90% on two seeds; private lineage requires decoded reference and fresh100

rule.rule: find the black origin sprite and the single colored direction hint; repeat the exact sprite along that hint vector, respecting generator flip/transpose and the true grid boundary
use the colored sprite inside the gray 7x7 frame as the template; recolor every unframed color-1 sprite with identical shape to the template color
rule.private_status: not private-zero catalogued, but task is in the downstream-contamination ledger

rule.rule: recover two colored Conway sprites and the yellow/color frame; undo the optional horizontal flip and place the sprites into the data-dependent framed output
rule.private_status: historical private-zero/black lineage; only decoded sound reference plus fresh100 can qualify

rule.rule: for each fully in-grid red rectangle, paint its black interior ring blue while preserving the red border and the inner red core; clipped rectangles are unchanged

default.session_error: Fail: [ONNXRuntimeError] : 1 : FAIL : Node (safe_name_22) Op (CenterCropPad) [ShapeInferenceError] Number of elements of input 'shape' (1) does not match the number of axes (2).
Fail: [ONNXRuntimeError] : 1 : FAIL : Node (safe_name_17) Op (CenterCropPad) [ShapeInferenceError] Number of elements of input 'shape' (1) does not match the number of axes (3).
